changelog: Multi-image upload: up to 4 screenshots per trade (1MB each)
Slideshow viewer in trade details with arrow navigation
Timeframe tabs for quick image switching
P&L vs Result validation (Loss must be negative, Win must be positive)
File size validation (1MB limit per image)
Backward compatible with existing single screenshots

db_migrations.name: add_screenshots_column
db_migrations.sql: ALTER TABLE trades ADD COLUMN screenshots TEXT DEFAULT NULL
